change_summary: Blocked dry-run and blocked execute records now include max_ec2_runtime_minutes, git_lfs_pull_skipped, deploy_bundle_s3_uri, and deploy_bundle_sha256 so pre-EC2 geometry evidence preserves deploy-bundle context even when AWS auth blocks execution.
next_action: Commit and push the helper hardening, then rerun the Canny deploy-bundle static-proof blocked gate from a clean pushed head.
